## Purpose
Describe why this pull request is being opened. Use [GitHub Markdown cheat sheet](https://github.com/adam-p/markdown-here/wiki/Markdown-Cheatsheet#links)
## Changes
### Added
- `claude-skill-author` skill with `SKILL.md` and `REFERENCE.md`
- new Cursor rule for project governance and boilerplate boundaries
### Refactored
- reorganized skill instructions to keep `SKILL.md` concise and move detail to `REFERENCE.md`
- improved naming for clarity (more explicit skill/rule names)
### Fixed
- corrected rule language to avoid suggesting product development in this repo
- fixed ambiguous instructions that could lead to editing boilerplate for feature work
### Removed
- removed placeholder examples and replaced with concrete PR examples
- removed deprecated or unclear wording from old guidance
